description_long: This is a Bank of America automated teller machine (ATM) encased in a rectangular, wall-mounted housing with a prominent red border. The ATM features a central screen interface above a metallic keypad and card slot, with a cash dispenser and receipt slot below. The upper section displays the Bank of America logo and branding, while the lower section is designed for user interaction, including a numeric keypad and function buttons. The structure is primarily metallic with some plastic components, and the housing is set on a concrete base. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A wall-mounted Bank of America ATM with a red-bordered housing, central screen, keypad, card slot, and cash dispenser, designed for public urban use.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the Bank of America branding, screen, keypad, card slot, and cash dispenser clearly.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the thinness of the ATM housing and the protruding concrete base.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate frontal view, similar to the front but with branding text mirrored and less detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile and the edge of the concrete base.
attribute_screen_interface: A medium-sized rectangular screen centrally placed above the keypad, likely LCD, with visible UI elements and possibly touch capability.
attribute_card_slot: One horizontal card slot located below the screen and above the keypad, with a metallic finish and possible illumination.
attribute_keypad_layout: A standard numeric keypad with 12 keys arranged in a 3x4 grid, positioned directly below the card slot and screen, with additional function buttons on the sides.
attribute_bank_branding: Bank of America logo and text prominently displayed at the top of the ATM in blue and red, with a white background.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small horizontal slot located below the keypad, likely for dispensing receipts, with a metallic or plastic trim.
